independent_tests.test_output_summary:
Result:
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitGracefulDegradation::test_init_graceful_degradation_graphiti_unavailable PASSED [  6%]
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitGracefulDegradation::test_init_handles_graphiti_connection_error PASSED [  7%]
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitSkipGraphitiFlag::test_init_skip_graphiti_flag PASSED [  8%]
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitWithTemplate::test_init_with_template_name PASSED [  9%]
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitWithTemplate::test_init_default_template_is_default PASSED [  9%]

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init fastapi-python` copies agents from `agents/` to `.claude/agents/`
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _copy_agents() which checks {template}/agents/ directory, filters for .md files (skipping .gitkeep), and copies to {target}/.claude/agents/. Test test_copies_agents_from_agents_dir verifies this with fastapi-python template structure.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _copy_agents() which checks {template}/agents/ directory, filters for .md files (skipping .gitkeep), and copies to {target}/.claude/agents/. Test test_copies_agents_from_agents_dir verifies this with fastapi-python template structure.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init fastmcp-python` copies agents from `.claude/agents/` to `.claude/agents/`
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _copy_agents() which also checks {template}/.claude/agents/ directory. Test test_copies_agents_from_dotclaude_agents_dir verifies this with fastmcp-python template structure.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _copy_agents() which also checks {template}/.claude/agents/ directory. Test test_copies_agents_from_dotclaude_agents_dir verifies this with fastmcp-python template structure.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init fastapi-python` copies rules from template to `.claude/rules/`
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _copy_rules() which recursively copies .claude/rules/**/*.md preserving directory structure. Test test_copies_rules_with_subdirectories verifies rules and subdirectory (guidance/testing.md) are copied.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _copy_rules() which recursively copies .claude/rules/**/*.md preserving directory structure. Test test_copies_rules_with_subdirectories verifies rules and subdirectory (guidance/testing.md) are copied.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init fastapi-python` copies CLAUDE.md from template to project root
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _copy_claude_md() which checks both root and .claude/ CLAUDE.md locations, copying whichever exists. Test test_copies_root_claude_md and test_copies_both_claude_md_when_both_exist verify this.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _copy_claude_md() which checks both root and .claude/ CLAUDE.md locations, copying whichever exists. Test test_copies_root_claude_md and test_copies_both_claude_md_when_both_exist verify this.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init default` works without manifest.json (skip with info, not error)
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _copy_manifest() which returns False gracefully when manifest.json is not present, logging an info message. Test test_skips_manifest_when_missing verifies no error is raised and no manifest.json appears in target.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _copy_manifest() which returns False gracefully when manifest.json is not present, logging an info message. Test test_skips_manifest_when_missing verifies no error is raised and no manifest.json appears in target.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init` copies manifest.json to `.claude/manifest.json` when present
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _copy_manifest() which copies manifest.json from template root to {target}/.claude/manifest.json. Test test_copies_manifest_json_when_present verifies content is copied correctly.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _copy_manifest() which copies manifest.json from template root to {target}/.claude/manifest.json. Test test_copies_manifest_json_when_present verifies content is copied correctly.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Existing files in target directory are NOT overwritten (skip with warning)
criteria_verification.evidence: All copy operations use _copy_file_if_not_exists() which checks dest.exists() before copying and logs a skip message. Test test_does_not_overwrite_existing_files verifies existing agent and CLAUDE.md files are preserved.
criteria_verification.notes: All copy operations use _copy_file_if_not_exists() which checks dest.exists() before copying and logs a skip message. Test test_does_not_overwrite_existing_files verifies existing agent and CLAUDE.md files are preserved.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Template not found produces a warning, not an error
criteria_verification.evidence: apply_template() calls _resolve_template_source_dir() which returns None if template not found. apply_template logs a warning and returns True (success with scaffold only). Test test_template_not_found_warns_not_errors verifies this.
criteria_verification.notes: apply_template() calls _resolve_template_source_dir() which returns None if template not found. apply_template logs a warning and returns True (success with scaffold only). Test test_template_not_found_warns_not_errors verifies this.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init` with no args still creates basic scaffold
criteria_verification.evidence: apply_template() always creates the basic directory structure (.claude/, tasks/, .guardkit/) before attempting template content copy. Test test_no_args_creates_basic_scaffold verifies all expected directories exist.
criteria_verification.notes: apply_template() always creates the basic directory structure (.claude/, tasks/, .guardkit/) before attempting template content copy. Test test_no_args_creates_basic_scaffold verifies all expected directories exist.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Template source resolved from installed package location
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _get_templates_base_dir() using __file__-relative path to locate installer/core/templates/, and _resolve_template_source_dir() which checks package location first then falls back to ~/.guardkit/templates/. Test test_resolves_from_package_location verifies this.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _get_templates_base_dir() using __file__-relative path to locate installer/core/templates/, and _resolve_template_source_dir() which checks package location first then falls back to ~/.guardkit/templates/. Test test_resolves_from_package_location verifies this.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover: all 7 templates, template not found, file conflict, agent location variants
criteria_verification.evidence: TestApplyTemplateAllTemplates uses @pytest.mark.parametrize to test all 7 templates (default, fastapi-python, fastmcp-python, mcp-typescript, nextjs-fullstack, react-fastapi-monorepo, react-typescript). Additional dedicated test classes cover template not found (TestApplyTemplateNotFound), file conflict (TestApplyTemplateConflictHandling), and agent location variants (TestApplyTemplateCopiesAgents with agents/ and .claude/agents/).
criteria_verification.notes: TestApplyTemplateAllTemplates uses @pytest.mark.parametrize to test all 7 templates (default, fastapi-python, fastmcp-python, mcp-typescript, nextjs-fullstack, react-fastapi-monorepo, react-typescript). Additional dedicated test classes cover template not found (TestApplyTemplateNotFound), file conflict (TestApplyTemplateConflictHandling), and agent location variants (TestApplyTemplateCopiesAgents with agents/ and .claude/agents/).
